Professional Barbershop
For Men Only

Royal Salon was built on one belief — every man deserves a cut that makes him feel like himself, only sharper. Located near Royal Farm, Purkhoo, we specialize in fades, tapers, beard work, and full grooming treatments — all done with precision.

We keep appointments limited intentionally — so every client gets full attention, no rush, no shortcuts.

When We're Open

Opening Hours

Drop by anytime during open hours, or book ahead to guarantee your slot.

Max 10 appointments on weekdays, 15 on Sundays. Book early — confirmation sent on WhatsApp.
